overall.description: A slow aerial drone shot through a moonlit desert canyon in a video game environment, featuring rocky cliff formations and a starry night sky with a large moon and secondary celestial body. The footage shows continuous forward movement over the rugged terrain with no visible characters or vehicles.

agents.ego_description: flying slowly forward over the canyon landscape, maintaining altitude while observing the rocky terrain below

entered.detail: large bright full moon dominating the night sky with visible surface details
smaller celestial body visible to the right of the large moon
tall rocky cliff face forming the central canyon wall with layered rock strata
distant rocky ridge line on the left horizon silhouetted against the sky
steep rocky canyon wall on the right side with rough texture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a desert canyon at night, illuminated by moonlight. The camera drifts forward over the rugged terrain, revealing tall cliff faces and distant ridges under a starry sky with two visible celestial bodies.

agents.ego_description: continuing the slow forward flight over the canyon, approaching closer to the cliff formations

segments.scene_description: The drone continues its forward movement through the canyon, bringing the rocky cliff faces into closer view. The perspective shifts to show more detail of the canyon walls while maintaining the moonlit atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide through a moonlit desert canyon that gradually draws closer to the towering rock formations. It begins with a wide perspective of the rugged terrain, drifting forward under a starry sky dominated by two celestial bodies. As the camera advances, the distant ridges and expansive canyon floor give way to a more intimate view of the landscape. The scene then shifts to bring the textured cliff faces into sharper focus, narrowing the field of view as the drone pushes deeper into the moonlit gorge.
